creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Created attachment 183971
Upgrade py-jsmin to 2.2.2

This patch upgrades py-jsmin to latest 2.2.2. There are only very minor cleanup changes to the project repository.

v2.2.2 (2017-05-01) Tikitu de Jager
-----------------------------------

- Add license headers to code files (fixes i#17)
- Remove mercurial files (fixes #20)

While at it:

* Make pkg-descr wording less ambiguous

Builds with Poudriere on 11.1-BETA3, 11.0, amd64, with python 2.7 and 3.5.
